mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.user_id, n.sender_id, n.type, n.title, n.content, n.target_id, n.target_type, n.is_read, n.create_time, u.nickname as sender_name, u.avatar as sender_avatar FROM sys_notification n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON n.sender_id = u.id WHERE n.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_notification (user_id, sender_id, type, title, content, target_id, target_type, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{senderId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{isRead}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_notification SET is_read = '1' WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_notification SET is_read = '1' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = '0'
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sys_notification WHERE id IN
#{id}
